zh.lifeSummary: 當Reynold Lucy於1359年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾庫布林頓時，他的父親Geoffrey De Lucy35歲，母親Lady Margery de Lucy44歲。他於1412年之前與Agnes Gosebourne在英國英格蘭結婚。他去世於1437年11月9日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾達林頓享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reynold Lucy于1359年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾庫布林頓时，他的父亲Geoffrey De Lucy35岁，母亲Lady Margery de Lucy44岁。他于1412年之前与Agnes Gosebourne在英国英格兰结婚。他去世于1437年11月9日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾達林頓享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Lucey  .
French: habitational name from any of various places called Lucy, originally named with the Latin personal name Lucius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lucey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Maeve, Niall.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luasaigh, an altered form of Mac Cluasaigh, a Cork name meaning ‘son of Cluasach’, a byname originally denoting someone with large or otherwise noticeable ears (from cluas ‘ear’).

nameMeanings.name: Reynold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Reinald, Reynaud, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ragin ‘advice, decision’ + wald ‘ruler’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them into England. In modern use, the given name sometimes represents a transferred use of the surname derived from the Norman personal name.

en.lifeSummary: When Reynold Lucy was born in 1359, in Cublington, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Geoffrey De Lucy, was 35 and his mother, Lady Margery de Lucy, was 44. He married Agnes Gosebourne before 1412, in England, United Kingdom. He died on 9 November 1437, in Dallington, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reynold Lucy est né en 1359, à Cublington, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geoffrey De Lucy, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Lady Margery de Lucy, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Gosebourne avant 1412, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 9 novembre 1437, à Dallington, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reynold Lucy 1359 in Cublington, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey De Lucy 35 und seine Mutter Lady Margery de Lucy 44. Er hat vor 1412 in England, United Kingdom Agnes Gosebourne geheiratet. Er starb am 9. November 1437 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Dallington, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reynold Lucy è nato il nel 1359 nel Cublington, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Geoffrey De Lucy, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margery de Lucy, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Gosebourne prima del 1412, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 9 novembre 1437, nel Dallington, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Reynold Lucyが1359年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアクウブリントンで生まれた時，父Geoffrey De Lucyは35歳，母Lady Margery de Lucyは44歳であった。1412年以前にイギリスイギリスでAgnes Gosebourneと結婚した。彼は1437年11月9日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアダリントンで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Reynold Lucy(이)가 1359년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 c블링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey De Lucy(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margery de Lucy(은)는 44세였다. 그는 1412년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Agnes Gosebourne(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1437년 11월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 댈링턴에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reynold Lucy nasceu em 1359, em Cublington, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Geoffrey De Lucy, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margery de Lucy, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Gosebourne antes 1412, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 9 de novembro de 1437, em Dallington, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reynold Lucy родился в 1359 г. в местности кублингтон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Geoffrey De Lucy было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margery de Lucy, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Gosebourne перед 1412 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 9 ноября 1437 г. в местности даллингтон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reynold Lucy nació en 1359, en Cublington, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Geoffrey De Lucy, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Lady Margery de Lucy, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Agnes Gosebourne antes de 1412, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 9 de noviembre de 1437, en Dallington, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 78 años.
